uncovered_waiver.reason: OMN-14822 hand-flips node_invariant_evaluate_compute to canonical def-B (OMN-14781 path): the three thin evaluator delegations move onto HandlerInvariantEvaluate/Batch/All.handle(request), and the shared _new_evaluator helper plus the HandlerInvariantEvaluate classification properties are re-derived byte-identical base_ref<->HEAD by the ratchet from git. Equivalence is proven by that git-verbatim preservation of the handler-module glue plus the green runtime-dispatch + full-corpus parity tests over the selected input corpus, not by a broad branch-coverage claim over the legacy handler body; the real invariant-evaluation logic lives in the untouched InvariantEvaluator (evaluator_invariant.py), whose branches are covered by test_evaluator_invariant_branches.py, so the thin handler module's own branch coverage over the deterministic dispatch corpus is measured but intentionally not the equivalence proof.
